questions.question: Which therapists & mental health in Washington Dc are open on weekends?
questions.answer: Therapists & Mental Health in Washington Dc with weekend hours include: IAFF Center of Excellence (Sat: 00:00 - 24:00), Think Happy Live Healthy (Sat: 06:00-21:00), Jenny Craig (Sat: 07:00-14:00). 3 total with weekend availability.
